Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Total liability (including under indemnities offered) limited to the lesser of: (a) amount paid under the contract / contract value (subject to liability limit in Research Contract Delegations) OR (b) NZD$500,000. Limited to direct losses caused by negligent acts/omissions or wilful misconduct of the University. Consequential or indirect losses, 'hold harmless', and loss of data/profit/revenue/savings/business/goodwill explicitly excluded. | Acceptable: Total liability limit (including indemnities) in line with Research Contract Delegations. Uncapped liability acceptable ONLY for Trusted Funders on contestable rounds. Indirect losses acceptable only if total exposure is capped per Delegations. Carve-outs from cap acceptable for: Fraud, Wilful default, Personal injury/death, statutory non-excludable liability, and confidentiality (only if client revenue < NZD$150M). | Escalation: Refer Research Grants and Contracts Delegations (and Portfolio Manager for Trusted Funders on non-contestable rounds).

flags.clause_title: 7 PUBLICATION
flags.snippet: 7 PUBLICATION
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Publication; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Principal Investigator has the right to publish. Reasonable patent stand-down (no more than 60 days from issuing the request). Students retain publication rights for thesis or academic publication, including commercially sensitive content. | Acceptable: Stand-down before publication acceptable provided ≤ 12 months. Student-produced commercially sensitive content may be embargoed for max 12 months. For Consulting Contracts only, removal of publications clause permitted by PI if (i) academic doesn't need results for research/publication, (ii) services not expected to generate new knowledge, (iii) no students relying on the research for thesis. | Escalation: Senior Manager, Research Grants and Contracts. Embargo > 12 months → School of Graduate Studies.

UoA must be able to disclose to agents and Affiliates. Duration up to 5 years post-completion of confidentiality period. | Acceptable: Confidentiality obligations limited in time (e.g. 5–7 years post-termination/expiry/disclosure). | Escalation: Senior Manager, Research Grants and Contracts.

Accrued rights and benefits not affected. Client pays termination costs including any uncancellable obligations. | Acceptable: Termination for convenience acceptable ONLY for Consulting contracts, with reasonable notice, PI agreement, and client paying termination costs / uncancellable obligations. Cannot always alter termination provisions for NZ and International Funding Agency contracts (escalate to PM). | Escalation: Senior Manager Research Grants and Contracts.
